stemHtml: If there is doubt whether ATC correctly understood a VOR name in your position report, you should...

options.a: Repeat the full position report, then say 'I say again' followed by the VOR name.
options.b: Repeat the report more slowly for ATC to understand.
options.c: Spell out the VOR name using the ICAO phonetic alphabet.
options.d: Ask the controller to confirm they understood correctly.
